mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_goods WHERE status = 1
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT g.id, g.name, g.description, g.price, g.image_url, g.status, g.created_at, g.updated_at, (s.total_stock - s.locked_stock - s.sold_count) AS available_stock FROM t_goods g LEFT JOIN t_stock s ON g.id = s.goods_id WHERE g.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_goods (name, description, price, image_url, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{imageUrl}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_goods SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
